boundary_records.boundary_statement: Module 10 synthesis must preserve species/source and maturity boundaries.
Module 10 synthesis must preserve injury mechanism or stimulus boundaries.
Module 10 synthesis must preserve timing and chronicity boundaries.
Module 10 synthesis must preserve endpoint directness boundaries.
Module 10 synthesis must preserve translation to human SCI boundaries.
Module 10 synthesis must preserve intervention-module comparability boundaries.
Module 10 synthesis must preserve abstract/source-page confidence boundaries.
Module 10 synthesis must preserve model-system or registry ontology boundaries.
